subject: ELECTION
body:
so,  as I see you as one of the most intuitive ,  say , realistic  people I 
have the privilege to know,  what  is your opinion so  far  ,  let alone 
ultimately , for this National election .  I  think I   know where I am so far , 
just not   sure the  mix  will work .  It is so politically planned   and I just  
don't know enough about the political process .  PREDICT for me ,  JEE     - 
I won't hold you to it ( don't   give me  "if i were such a genius ..." )
routine , either .  Even guesses can change = that's why they  are  called 
guesses or predictions .....DUH
Just chATTING. cOME ON -  YOU CAN DO IT with me .
   
You didn't respond to those little questions i e-mailed  earlier  today.   
Now that IS IMPORTANT .
nighty -night  ,
Marcia Mae  Friedman - Simon -  LYONS

so,  as I see you as one of the most intuitive ,  say , realistic people I have the privilege to know,  what  is your opinion so far  ,  let alone ultimately , for this National election .  I think I   know where I am so far , just not   sure the mix  will work .  It is so politically planned   and I just don't know enough about the political process .  PREDICT for me , JEE     - I won't hold you to it ( don't   give me  "if i were such a genius ..." )
routine , either .  Even guesses can change = that's why they are  called guesses or predictions .....DUH
